docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 77825428) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHETA, PERLA AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, SANTOS FRANCIS DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-13-2026 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-09-2026 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-20-2026
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 77825428) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANCHETA, PERLA
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 77825428) TO PLAINTIFF ANCHETA, PERLA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-13-2026 CONTINUED TO JUL-15-2026 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEYS FEES AND COSTS. (TRANSACTION ID # 79451482)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-15-2026 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
